channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Xaviersobased Announces Debut Australia Tour With Vivid LIVE Date
item.description: Guess who's bringing the vibes Down Under?! 🌏🎶 Xaviersobased is set to rock Australia at Vivid LIVE! Let's dance! 💃 #livemusic #AustraliaBound

item.title: BigXthaPlug Leads a Sing-a-Long to Ella Langley’s ‘Choosin’ Texas,’ Delivers the Hits to Stagecoach
item.description: Get your cowboy boots ready for a wild ride with BigXthaPlug at Stagecoach! 🤠🎶 #YeehawMusicVibes

item.title: Noah Cyrus Makes It a Family Affair at Stagecoach With Billy Ray and Braison Cyrus
item.description: 🤠 Cyrus family reunion at Stagecoach! Noah, Billy Ray, and Braison bring the party to the stage! 🎶 #Stagecoach #FamilyAffair

item.title: Ella Langley Brings Out Theo Von for ‘You Look Like You Love Me’ Duet at Stagecoach
item.description: 🎤 Ella Langley + Theo Von = Unforgettable duet moment at Stagecoach! 🌟🎶 #StagecoachSurprise

item.title: Born-Again Christian Russell Brand Struggles to Find Bible Passage
item.description: 🎤 Russell Brand's new quest: cracking the code of the Good Book! 📖 #RussellBrand #BibleJourney
